translation.literal_translation: If it be said 'No, because of word and the rest, and because of inner-establishment' - not so: because of instruction of that vision; because of impossibility; and because they also read him as person. (26)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.26: lexical/locative objections fail due to drsti-upadesa, impossibility of full predicate-fit otherwise, and recensional support for person-form reading.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra triad rebuts the jatharagni-only interpretation.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S02 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit vaisvanara lexical-rhetorical pivots and drsti-upadesa framing in records 1.2.063-1.2.070.
